patient_profile: The 28-year-old patient has been working as a freelance writer for the past year, trying to establish a consistent client base while also taking on occasional part-time teaching gigs to make ends meet. They've been struggling to find a balance between work and personal life, often staying up late into the night to meet deadlines or respond to emails. Recently, they've experienced a few setbacks in their freelance career, including a cancelled project and a missed payment from a previous client. As a result, they've started to feel overwhelmed and anxious about making ends meet, which has been affecting their overall well-being.

conversation.content: Hi, thank you for coming in today. I'm glad we have this opportunity to talk.
Yeah, thanks for having me. I've been feeling pretty worn out lately. Like, I just got back from a trip and was really looking forward to catching up on some sleep...
A trip? That sounds like it could have been nice. How did you find the experience?
It was okay, I guess. A bit exhausting, to be honest. But that's not really what's been bothering me lately. More just... feeling like I'm constantly running on empty.
I see. Running on empty can be tough. What do you mean by 'constantly'? Is it something specific in your daily routine?
Yeah, work. I've been doing freelance writing and teaching part-time. It's been tough to balance everything. Sometimes I find myself staying up really late to meet deadlines or respond to emails...
That sounds like a lot of pressure. How do you usually take care of yourself when things get busy?
Honestly? Not very well, I think. Sometimes I'll just grab something quick to eat or skip meals altogether if I'm feeling overwhelmed.
I see. It sounds like you might be struggling with finding some balance in your life right now. How's your appetite been lately?
To be honest, it's been pretty hit or miss. Some days I'll have no problem eating a big meal, and others... I just don't feel like eating at all.
I'm going to take that as a score of about one out of three for your appetite lately?
Yeah, I guess so. It's just... everything feels like it's weighing on me right now.
I understand that things can feel overwhelming. Can you tell me more about what's been going on with your work? You mentioned a cancelled project and missed payment?
Yeah... it's just really frustrating. I put in so much effort, and then to have something like that happen... it feels like a big waste of time.
I can imagine how disheartening that must be. How are you sleeping lately?
To be honest? I'm probably averaging about seven or eight hours of sleep a night, but it feels more like four or five when I wake up feeling so groggy.
I see. It sounds like you might be struggling with getting some restful sleep lately. And how about your mood? Has that been affected at all?
Yeah... I've just been feeling really down and anxious a lot of the time. Like, even little things can set me off.
